title: Infrastructure, Docker, persistence, backend foundation
key_decisions: DATABASE_URL assembled at runtime by docker-entrypoint.sh (reads /run/secrets/db_password) — shell substitution in docker-compose env vars does not work
config/index.ts also constructs DATABASE_URL from DB_HOST/DB_PORT/DB_NAME/DB_USER + secret, sets process.env.DATABASE_URL as side-effect so Prisma picks it up
Multi-stage Docker builds: builder stage compiles TS + generates Prisma client; production stage is minimal alpine
Frontend Dockerfile: Vite build → Nginx alpine serving dist/ with SPA fallback
Prisma schema moved to backend/prisma/schema.prisma (Prisma convention); database/schema.prisma kept in sync as canonical reference
Added 7 missing models: IntegrationKey, StoredValueTransaction, CompensationRule, MetricsSnapshot, JobRecord, BackupRecord; added Coupon back-reference
Added acknowledgedBy/acknowledgedAt to AnomalyEvent (was missing the acknowledge state transition actor)
claimedAt added to ParkingAlert for SLA calculation
Seed is idempotent (upsert/skip-if-exists) — safe to run repeatedly
files_created: repo/frontend/src/views/* (30 stub views for all routes)
next_prompt: Prompt 3 — Auth module, RBAC, audit logging, master data CRUD with bulk import/export
